title: vicia canescens subsp. gregaria
intro: Vicia canescens subsp. gregaria, also known as woolly vetch or woolly vetch subsp. gregaria, is a plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, woolly vetch subsp. gregaria is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
